issues.description: Trigger type 'Trigger' is invalid. Blocker keyword ability should use 'OnAttacked' trigger (when opponent declares attack).
Action 'PlaySelf' is incorrect. Blocker rests the card and redirects attack target; no 'PlaySelf' action exists. Should use 'Rest' action.

DSL completely misrepresents Blocker mechanics. Blocker is a static keyword ability, not a triggered effect that plays the card. The mechanic allows resting this card to become the attack target instead of the intended target.
